subcodes.first_line: O thou who art beset by dire calamity! Afflictions and sorrows have encompassed thee from every side, and great tribulation hath been ordained for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مورد مصیبت کبری مصائب و احزان از هر جهت ترا احاطه نمود و مشقت عظمی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for forgiveness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
